explicit_text: I joined the United States Air Force on March 29th, 1961, when I was 19 and a half years old. I served for 22 and a half years, retiring as a major in 1983. Throughout my career, I worked in various roles including auditing and managing acquisition audits for aircraft systems like the F-15 and F-16. The Air Force also supported my education, allowing me to attend Syracuse University and earn my commission as an officer.
